items.title_zh: 浪潮信息发布业界企业级OpenClaw方案「企千虾」
items.summary_zh: 量子位：4月2日浪潮信息发布「企千虾」方案，解决企业规模化部署OpenClaw的安全、部署、成本痛点，实现本地化全链路管控，支持千级实例一键部署。

items.title_zh: 阿里千问APP上线Wan2.7全能演技派模型
items.summary_zh: 量子位：阿里最新上线千问APP的Wan2.7，在AI内容创作领域实现史诗级增强，支持视频编辑续写、动作模仿、图像生成自定义五官、HEX精准控色，国内生成模型盲测评分第一。

items.title_en: Moonbounce raises $12M for AI content moderation engine
items.title_zh: Moonbounce 融资 1200 万美元用于 AI 内容审核引擎
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：前 Facebook 业务诚信主管 Brett Levenson 创立的 Moonbounce 融资 1200 万美元，其 AI 控制引擎可将内容审核政策转化为可预测的 AI 行为。
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Moonbounce, founded by ex-Facebook business integrity lead Brett Levenson, raised $12 million for an AI control engine that converts content moderation policies into predictable AI behavior.

items.title_en: Google DeepMind releases Gemma 4 open models
items.title_zh: Google DeepMind 发布 Gemma 4 开源模型
items.summary_zh: Google DeepMind：Gemma 4 是迄今为止最智能的开源模型，专为高级推理和智能体工作流而设计。
items.summary_en: Google DeepMind: Gemma 4 is the most intelligent open models to date, purpose-built for advanced reasoning and agentic workflows.

items.title_en: OpenAI acquires TBPN, the buzzy founder-led business talk show
items.title_zh: OpenAI 收购 TBPN，这档由创始人主导的热门商业脱口秀节目
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：TBPN 是硅谷最受欢迎的科技播客，将独立运营，由首席政治策略师 Chris Lehane 负责。
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: TBPN, Silicon Valley's cult-favorite tech podcast, will operate independently, overseen by chief political operative Chris Lehane.

items.title_en: Microsoft takes on AI rivals with three new foundational models
items.title_zh: 微软推出三款新基础模型挑战 AI 竞争对手
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：MAI 发布了可将语音转录为文本以及生成音频和图像的模型，该团队在六个月前成立。
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: MAI released models that can transcribe voice into text as well as generate audio and images after the group's formation six months ago.

items.title_en: Google now lets you direct avatars through prompts in its Vids app
items.title_zh: Google 现在允许你在 Vids 应用中通过提示词指导虚拟形象
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：Google 正在 Vids 应用中添加一种方式，用于自定义和指导虚拟形象进行视频创作。
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Google is adding a way to customize and instruct avatars for video creation in the Vids app.

items.summary_zh: OpenAI：OpenAI 收购 TBPN 以加速围绕 AI 的全球对话，支持独立媒体，扩大与开发者、企业和更广泛科技社区的对话。
items.summary_en: OpenAI: OpenAI acquires TBPN to accelerate global conversations around AI and support independent media, expanding dialogue with builders, businesses, and the broader tech community.

items.title_en: Codex now offers more flexible pricing for teams
items.title_zh: Codex 现在为团队提供更灵活的定价
items.summary_zh: OpenAI：Codex 现在为 ChatGPT Business 和 Enterprise 提供按需付费定价，为团队提供更灵活的选项来开始和扩大采用。
items.summary_en: OpenAI: Codex now includes pay-as-you-go pricing for ChatGPT Business and Enterprise, providing teams a more flexible option to start and scale adoption.
